title: AFMU Repair Sessions
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(CASE WHEN FullyRepaired = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fullyRepaired FROM AfmuRepairs WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.help: Auto Field-Maintenance Unit repair events — a strong indicator of Thargoid or AX combat damage
